Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present.
Attorney Tony Ruch, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Carl Kuhne is present.
Attorney Richard Smoke, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. Plaintiff requests to remove this case from the Trial Calendar for 12-5-2011.
